symbols: writing desk — poetic and prophetic composition
medallion frame — veneration of classical wisdom within Christian humanist tradition
grotesque ornament — Renaissance fusion of classical and Christian decorative vocabulary
description: A ceiling panel shows the Roman poet Virgil seated at a writing desk within a central rectangular frame, surrounded by elaborate gilded grotesque ornament. Around the central portrait are circular medallions with smaller figures in grisaille. The panel is richly decorated with scrolling foliage, arabesques, and classical motifs in gold and ochre tones. The overall composition follows Renaissance decorative convention for celebrating illustrious figures of antiquity.
